## Warning in eval(ei, envir): NAs introduced by coercion
## Warning in eval(ei, envir): NAs introduced by coercion
pete_buttigieg_data<- democratic_party_primary_polling|>filter(Candidate =="Pete Buttigieg")|>mutate(Poll_Boundary=ifelse(State=="NULL","Nationwide",State))
head(pete_buttigieg_data)

pete_buttigieg_chart<-pete_buttigieg_data|>ggplot(aes(x=DMY,y=Polling,color=Poll_Boundary)) + geom_point(alpha=0.6)+geom_line()+scale_x_date(date_breaks="3 months") + labs(title="Pete Buttigieg",x="Date",y="Polling (%)")
pete_buttigieg_chart

pete_buttigieg_summary<-pete_buttigieg_data|>summarise(avg_polling=round(mean(Polling),digits=2),weighted_avg_polling=round(sum(Polling*Sample_Size/(sum(Sample_Size,na.rm=TRUE)),na.rm=TRUE),digits=2),
                                                       standard_deviation=round(sd(Polling),digits=2),maximum_polling=max(Polling),minimum_polling=min(Polling),median_polling=median(Polling))
pete_buttigieg_summary
##   avg_polling weighted_avg_polling standard_deviation maximum_polling
## 1       12.15                12.44               5.65            31.5
##   minimum_polling median_polling
## 1               4             10
